g.text: FOREIGN KEY (UserId) REFERENCES Users(UserId) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (OrderId) REFERENCES Orders(OrderId) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (ProductId) REFERENCES Products(ProductId) ON DELETE CASCADE
